series_metadata.series_title: County Auditor Continuing Education Status Report
series_metadata.series_description: Ohio County Auditor Continuing Education Status Report is filed yearly with the Tax Commissioner by the County Auditor''s Assocation of Ohio per Revised Code Section 319.04

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 years after Tax Commisioner Audit. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years after Tax Commissioner Audit., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
